## Closing Checklist

- [ ] Tests land in this PR, at the correct layer (unit / integration / smoke / e2e / content) — no "tests later"
- [ ] Verification-command output (or a CI run link) is pasted into the PR body above, before merge
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `chore:`, `ci:`)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, client names, or proprietary content
- [ ] CI is green (lint, typecheck, tests)
